subcodes.title: The Need for Union between the Peoples of the East and West: Words spoken on 1911-10-20 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: In the past, as in the present, the Spiritual Sun of Truth has always shone from the horizon of the East
subcodes.subjects: @East and West; communication between East and West, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @universal peace; world unity
